name: HMCS St. Lambert (K 343)
events: 6 Jul 1944 HMS L 27 (Lt. J.N. Elliott, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Bermuda with HMCS St. Lambert (T/Lt. R.C. Hayden, RCNVR), HMCS Kentville (T/Lt. F.G. Rainsford, RCNVR), HMCS St. Therese (T/Cdr. J.E. Mitchell, RCNVR) and HMCS Eastview (T/A/Lt.Cdr. A.M. Kirkpatrick, RCNVR). (1)
22 Jul 1944 Around 1130 B/22, HMS Unruffled (Lt. R.F. Park, RN) departed Halifax for Bermuda. She was escorted by HMCS St. Lambert (T/Lt. R.C. Hayden, RCNVR). (2)
26 Jul 1944 Around 1400 P/26, HMS Unruffled (Lt. R.F. Park, RN) and HMCS St. Lambert (T/Lt. R.C. Hayden, RCNVR) arrived at Bermuda from Halifax. (2)

9 Aug 1944 HMS L 27 (Lt. J.N. Elliott, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Bermuda with HMCS Trillium (T/Lt. K.E. Meredith, RCNVR), HMCS Red Deer (T/Lt. D.B.D. Ross, RCNVR), HMCS St. Lambert (T/Lt. R.C. Hayden, RCNVR) and HMCS Kentville (T/Lt. F.G. Rainsford, RCNVR). (1)
